archimate:Goal.name: Objective O2: Technical Roadmap Design
archimate:Goal.documentation:
Objective O2: Technical Roadmap Design
• A2.1: Develop a detailed technical roadmap outlining development phases, milestones, and deliverables for the next three years
• A2.2: Integrate advanced technologies such as AI, Data Spaces, and IoT to enhance the functionality, scalability, and adaptability of the LDT framework
